'''鈭歴h-n-n-v''' ('''kashanevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvularize|uvularize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvularize|uvularize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-n-n-v
|-
! Lemma
| kashanevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishanevoko|thishanevoko]] || [[word:jishanevoko|jishanevoko]] || [[word:shishanevoko|shishanevoko]] || [[word:kishanevoko|kishanevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushanevoko|thuthushanevoko]] || [[word:jujushanevoko|jujushanevoko]] || [[word:shushushanevoko|shushushanevoko]] || [[word:kukushanevoko|kukushanevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushanevoko|thushanevoko]] || [[word:jushanevoko|jushanevoko]] || [[word:shushanevoko|shushanevoko]] || [[word:kushanevoko|kushanevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushanevoko|thushanevoko]] || [[word:jushanevoko|jushanevoko]] || [[word:shushanevoko|shushanevoko]] || [[word:kushanevoko|kushanevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshanevoko|theshanevoko]] || [[word:jeshanevoko|jeshanevoko]] || [[word:sheshanevoko|sheshanevoko]] || [[word:keshanevoko|keshanevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshanevoko|thothoshanevoko]] || [[word:jojoshanevoko|jojoshanevoko]] || [[word:shoshoshanevoko|shoshoshanevoko]] || [[word:kokoshanevoko|kokoshanevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshanevoko|thoshanevoko]] || [[word:joshanevoko|joshanevoko]] || [[word:shoshanevoko|shoshanevoko]] || [[word:koshanevoko|koshanevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshanevoko|thoshanevoko]] || [[word:joshanevoko|joshanevoko]] || [[word:shoshanevoko|shoshanevoko]] || [[word:koshanevoko|koshanevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shanevoko|th忙shanevoko]] || [[word:j忙shanevoko|j忙shanevoko]] || [[word:sh忙shanevoko|sh忙shanevoko]] || [[word:k忙shanevoko|k忙shanevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashanevoko|thashanevoko]] || [[word:jashanevoko|jashanevoko]] || [[word:shashanevoko|shashanevoko]] || [[word:kashanevoko|kashanevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashanevoko|thashanevoko]] || [[word:jashanevoko|jashanevoko]] || [[word:shashanevoko|shashanevoko]] || [[word:kashanevoko|kashanevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
